title: 4 x clipper lighters - WEED LOVE
features: These clipper lighters feature a classic flame which increases when you tilt the lighter. They also feature a child safety device.
description: Product Description ksp partners ltd 4 X CLIPPER LIGHTERS The clipper lighters are refillable, you can also change the stones! 4 x CLIPPER FLINT LIGHTERS – You will receive a total of 4 clipper lighters (colours as in the picture). EFILLABLE LIGHTERS – These lighters are refillable so they can be easily topped up. REPLACEABLE FLINT – The flints can easily be changed on these lighters which means you can use the same design for longer. PRODUCT DIMENSIONS - Each cigarette lighter size is approx. 8cm x 2cm x 2cm. Solid and durable quality.
